data.description: IRAN'S LEADER MOJTABA KHAMENEI COMMENDED HEZBOLLAH IN A MESSAGE TO ITS LEADER, PROMISING ONGOING SUPPORT - POSTED ON HIS TELEGRAM CHANNEL.

data.title: AAVE priced at $99.32, may reach $110-128 by May 2026. Bearish MACD, neutral RSI signal potential recovery if $104 resistance breaks.
data.description: The digital currency AAVE is currently trading at $99.32, showing conflicting indications in the market - a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) remains neutral. Analysts predict a potential price rebound to a range between $110 and $128 over the next four weeks, contingent upon a breach of the critical resistance level at $104.

data.title: Wallbox Agrees on the Terms to Implement a Comprehensive Restructuring Plan
data.description: Wallbox N.V., a leading global company in electric vehicle charging and energy management solutions, has finalized the terms for a comprehensive restructuring plan. The plan is subject to the signing of relevant documents, court approval, and customary conditions. Following the initial agreement on December 1, 2025, and March 4, 202_, this development marks a significant step in the company's strategic restructuring. Wallbox, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WBX, is moving forward with this plan to enhance its operations and financial stability.

data.title: Floating Offshore Wind Market worth $25.40 billion by 2031 | MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, it has been reported that the worldwide Floating Offshore Wind Market is anticipated to expand significantly. MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts show that the market size will increase from USD 3.16 billion in 2026 to USD 25.40 billion by 2031. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 51.7% over the forecast period.

data.title: Flagship Pioneering and AWS Announce Collaboration to Accelerate Drug Discovery and Life Sciences Innovation
data.description: Flagship Pioneering, a hub of scientific innovation based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, announced on April 1, 2026, that its early-stage companies will be granted access to AWS cloud credits, technical assistance, and AI tools to expedite drug discovery and enhance scientific platforms. This move is intended to boost innovation, with the selected companies set to benefit from resources to accelerate their research endeavors.

data.title: Immunic Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: In New York on April 1, 2026, Immunic, Inc. (Nasdaq: IMUX), a leading biotech firm focusing on innovative oral treatments for neurologic conditions, revealed receiving a written Notice from the Listing Qualifications Department.

data.title: GFL Environmental Announces Densification of Southern US Footprint with the Acquisition of Frontier Waste Solutions and Provides an update on year-to-date M&A activity
data.description: In Miami Beach, FL, on April 1, 2026, GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) (TSX: GFL) revealed the completion of the purchase of Frontier Waste Solutions, expanding its solid waste assets with 24 sites in Texas. This acquisition marks a significant growth for GFL in the waste management sector.

data.title: QuickFi Enables Air-tow Trailers National Digital Captive Finance Program
data.description: Air-tow Trailers, based in Wapakoneta, Ohio, revealed on April 1, 2026, that it has rolled out a new digital captive finance initiative in collaboration with QuickFi, a prominent embedded lending platform. The renowned manufacturer of single and tandem axle drop-deck trailers is introducing this program to provide financial solutions to its customers. This partnership aims to streamline the lending process for clients.

data.title: Lido DAO's technical analysis hints at $0.40 target by mid-April with RSI at 61.98 and a positive MACD momentum.
data.description: Lido DAO is displaying positive technical indicators, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 61.98 and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) showing signs of a positive momentum shift. Analysts predict that if current resistance levels are surpassed, the price of LDO could reach $0.40 within the next two weeks.

data.title: Sino Biological ProPure™ Endotoxin-Free Proteins: The "Invisible Guardian" of Biopharmaceuticals
data.description: In Houston on April 1, 2026, it was reported that despite meticulous efforts, unexpected behavior in cells or the onset of fever and systemic inflammation in mouse models may be attributed to endotoxin, specifically the lipopolysaccharide (LPS) from gram-negative sources. This finding underscores the importance of recognizing the impact of endotoxins in research settings, with a focus on mitigating their effects on cellular and animal models.

data.title: Sapiens Selects Industry Leader as Chief Marketing Officer
data.description: Eva Skidmore has been appointed as the Chief Marketing Officer of Sapiens International Corporation N.V. (Sapiens) in London on April 1, 2026. Skidmore, a seasoned B2B SaaS marketing executive, is expected to drive AI-led growth for the company. This decision marks a strategic move by Sapiens to strengthen its marketing division by bringing in Skidmore's expertise. The appointment showcases the company's commitment to accelerating growth in the competitive market.

data.title: Huawei, LG Electronics and Nokia Named as Founder Licensors of New Sisvel POS Pool
data.description: Luxembourg - Three leading innovators, Huawei, LG Electronics, and Nokia, have come together to establish a new Point of Sale (POS) patent pool, encompassing technology from 2G to 5G. Sisvel has officially introduced this initiative, offering standard essential patents (SEPs) related to cellular-connected POS devices. This move aims to streamline access to this widely utilized technology. The pool is open for licensors to join, with early participation incentives in place until a certain date.

data.title: Hedera's price aims for $0.16, with mixed signals from indicators. Caution urged due to neutral RSI and bearish MACD.
data.description: The price prediction for HBAR indicates a bullish trend aiming for $0.16 by the end of January. Despite a neutral RSI and bearish MACD suggesting caution for traders, the forecast remains optimistic.

data.title: Bebird Launches EarSight Ultra : The 5G-Powered Ear Care Solution for Modern Families Pursuing a Quality Life
data.description: Introducing the EarSight Ultra by Bebird, a cutting-edge device launched on April 1, 2026. This next-generation product promises unparalleled visual clarity and improved safety measures, catering to proactive family wellness. Bebird, a renowned innovator in smart personal care, has created this groundbreaking device with discerning parents in mind. The EarSight Ultra is set to revolutionize personal care technology with its advanced features.
